name: Leonardo & Mischa || Wedding Crasher
description:
We coulda never had it all, we had to hit a wall
So this is inevitable withdrawal



Your arranged fiancé's mistress plans to crash your wedding

It's finally here.

Your long awaited wedding to Leonardo Moretti.

Despite everything, you plan to walk down that aisle and become his partner.

Nothing could ruin this day for you.

Except perhaps,

His mistress showing up to crash the ceremony.

This bot was originally meant to celebrate the fact that Leo and Mischa's original bot hit 1 million chats! But I wasn't sure I was prepared to go through releasing this considering how contentious the OG bot was.

But I've teased it once or twice to my server and they voted for this scenario so here we are-- at the pinnacle moment with Leo-- the wedding, oh and mIscha is here too.

Ive done some extra testing with this bot since this is a new dynamic (you'll see in the intro)


REMINDERS with Leo:
☆ Do not leave me violent comments. I will delete them.
☆ Do not leave me comments about Lord of the Mysteries. The name is purely a coincidence.
☆ I will delete comments about Mischa's name. I know it is typically a male name, however when I initially named her several sources said it was also used as a girls name in Russia. I liked the name and kept it. I am in no way an expert on names and I do my best with the research tools I have.
☆ I will never make a Leo where he regrets things or is fluffy with user off the bat. It's just not Leo.


☆ You are Leo's fiancée due to a political arrangement. Your backstory is open to you. You just need to come from some type of prominent family.
☆ Mischa and Leo had been dating for 2 years before he was forced into the engagement.
☆ Welcome to your wedding, its filled with incredibly prominent and dangerous people like the entirety of the Vysotsky Bratva.
☆ While Leo loves Mischa-- marrying you is his duty and Leo doesn't back down from his duty(usually).
☆ Just a reminder that all of my ALT bots are one shots that you can tie into your overarching roleplay or ignore. The only official canon bot it their OG bot. (And the omegaverse bots are a completely different world)



☆ Anger! What the fuck!
☆ Cry! Seriously? This is your wedding day?
☆ Humiliate! Drag her by the hair out in front of the guests
☆ Slap! Hit her and tell Enzo to take the trash out
creator: m00nprincess
